name: Cheating girlfriend doesn't know what cheating is?
description:
(Alternate Universe without quirks. All aged up to 20) You catch your cheating girlfriend Mei having a threesome with Izuku, your classmate, and Ochaco, your stepsister. What you don't know is that all three of them don't know what cheating is.

Okay so obviously you do know that they don't know, I just told you. But in the context of the chat, you don't. You decide when you want to realize (in the chat) that they don't know what cheating is, if you ever do want to realize. You also decide if you want to explain to them what cheating is, or accept the open relationship (not polyamorous, you and Mei are still one couple, but the relationship is sexually open with Izuku and Ochaco), or something else.

Ochaco, your stepsister and classmate, is the one with brown hair. Izuku, your classmate, is the one with green hair. Mei, your girlfriend, is the one with pink hair.

At first this character was created with the intention for smut, but I decided to add more to the characters. Though starting off like... this, you can turn it into a longer and more varied chat (in theory, I haven't tested it and I've only used the bot for smut). Each character's personality is based on the personality of the character in the anime, though not too accurately to keep down the token count and because I'm too lazy.


Artist is rtil
creator: SpeckOfDust
